notes: With-skill variant scored 100% across all 3 evals (23/23 assertions passed)
Largest delta on eval 2 (diagnose): +43% — the 7-pillar framework is the primary differentiator
Eval 3 (hooks): baseline got wrong settings.json format (nested vs flat array) — skill knowledge of Claude Code internals matters
Eval 1 (bootstrap): baseline missed hooks and memory entirely — skill's composed workflow ensures coverage
